news.headline: Baker Hughes to release Q1 2025 results on April 22 at 5 p.m. ET and hold webcast on April 23 at 9:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Houston and London, March 13, 2025 - Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) is set to reveal its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The announcement will be made through a press release at 5 p.m. Eastern Time (4 p.m. Central Time) on Tuesday, April 22, 2025. A webcast has been scheduled for Wednesday, April 23, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time (8:30 a.m. Central Time) to discuss these results.

news.headline: Southwire partners with Plug Power to reduce carbon emissions in the supply chain by introducing sustainable alternatives to lead acid batteries.
news.summary: An agreement has been reached by Plug to enter the industrial supplier market, showcasing a sustainable alternative to lead acid batteries. This move signifies Plug's commitment to providing eco-friendly solutions in this sector. The agreement, which aims to capitalize on the demand for environmentally friendly products, has already garnered attention within the industry. With the market for industrial suppliers growing rapidly, this new venture could potentially revolutionize the sector. Plug's emphasis on sustainability is expected to appeal to businesses looking to reduce their carbon footprint. This demonstrates a shift towards more environmentally conscious practices, with a focus on innovation and ecological impact.

news.headline: Liquidity Services and AIS partner for second China sale with energy giant, featuring 2 MAN turbines and 1 rotor, boosting circular economy.
news.summary: BETHESDA, Md., March 13, 2025 - Liquidity Services, a global commerce company traded on NASDAQ under LQDT, will hold a second sale in China for a top global energy enterprise. Teaming up with Aaron Industrial Solutions (AIS), an esteemed auctioneer and asset manager, the sale features 2x MAN Diesel & Turbo SE DK080/250R Industrial Steam Turbines and 1x Unused Steam Turbine Rotor & Accessories. This auction expands on their prior cooperation introducing the energy giant's surplus assets to the Chinese market.

news.headline: MeiraGTx partners with Hologen AI in $200M deal, forms joint venture with $230M capital for Parkinson's treatment.
news.summary: A significant collaboration was revealed today between two companies, with MeiraGTx receiving an upfront payment of $200 million from Hologen AI. Additionally, a joint venture named Hologen Neuro AI Ltd was established, with an additional $230 million allocated for accelerating the Phase 3 clinical development of AAV-GAD for Parkinson’s disease. This partnership signifies a commitment to advancing research and treatment in the field of neurology.

news.headline: Blum Holdings Inc. announces 2024 financial results with $33.1 million in net income - significant transformation.
news.summary: In Downey, California, on March 13, 2025, Blum Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: BLMH), a publicly traded holding company and cannabis operator based in California, revealed its financial outcomes for the year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company highlighted the conclusion of a notable financial and operational overhaul.

news.headline: FDA approved Phase 2 trial of TPST-1495 for FAP. Second program in Phase 2, data anticipated by 2026.
news.summary: Another clinical program is progressing to Phase 2, with anticipated data release in 2026. This marks the second program reaching this phase, highlighting steady advancement in research and development. This news underscores the commitment to innovation, with an emphasis on accelerating the timeline for potential new treatments. The promising data expected in 2026 will provide crucial insights and milestones in the development process, showcasing the dedication to advancing medical research. This achievement signifies significant progress, setting the stage for potential breakthroughs in the coming years.

news.headline: XWELL to invest in medical spas for wellness. $4M private placement spurs expansion, with initial acquisitions by year-end.
news.summary: A $4 million private placement has been secured to drive expansion plans, with the company set to make initial acquisitions by the end of the year.

news.headline: Perma-Fix (NASDAQ: PESI) reports financial results for full year & Q4 2024 in Atlanta; important updates shared.
news.summary: Atlanta, March 13, 2025 - Today, Perma-Fix Environmental Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: PESI) disclosed its financial performance and business outlook for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: New game ‘My Pet Hooligan’ to debut on Arbitrum's 'Studio Chain' platform for games and entertainment; Karrat Foundation leads the initiative.
news.summary: The Karrat Foundation is in the spotlight for launching the Studio Chain using Arbitrum's Ethereum layer-2 technology. The Studio Chain will be the venue for hosting My Pet Hooligan.

news.headline: zSpace (NASDAQ: ZSPC) to join Russell 2000 & Russell 3000 Indexes on March 24, 2025, in quarterly IPO additions.
news.summary: A company based in San Jose, California, zSpace, specializing in augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) education, revealed on March 13, 2025, that they will be included in the prestigious Russell 2000® and the Russell 3000® Indexes. This move comes as part of the quarterly Russell US Index initial public offering (IPO) additions, and will be implemented after the U.S. market opens on March 24, 2025. zSpace, traded as ZSPC on the NASDAQ, has earned recognition for its position in the emerging AR/VR sector.

news.headline: Adagene to present at Immuno-Oncology Summit in Boston on March 26, 2025 (11th annual event).
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Adagene Inc. revealed its plans to present at the 11th Annual Immuno-Oncology 360⁰ Summit happening in Boston on March 26, 2025. Adagene, listed as ADAG on Nasdaq, is known for revolutionizing the creation and advancement of new antibody-based treatments. This event serves as a platform for discussing advancements in cancer treatment and is expected to draw attention from experts and investors within the industry.

news.headline: Senate Banking Committee set to vote on crypto legislation after 17 months; Sen. Warren aims to avert crypto mutiny.
news.summary: The Senate Banking Committee is gearing up to vote on new legislation for the first time in over 17 months. This upcoming vote has put pressure on Senator Elizabeth Warren as she works to prevent a potential revolt within the committee regarding cryptocurrency regulations.

news.headline: Vaxart to present 2024 business update & financial results on Mar 20 in conference call.
Superior Group of Companies will participate in Sidoti Investor Conference on March 19, 2025 at 1:45 PM Eastern Time.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) revealed that Chief Financial Officer Mike Koempel and President of Branded Products Jake Himelstein are set to engage in a fireside chat during the Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on March 19, 2025, at 1:45 PM Eastern Time. Interested parties can access the live webcast and replay on the Events & Presentations section of the organization's Investor Relations website. Moreover, management will conduct virtual meetings on the same day.

news.headline: CURRENC's Founder Alex Kong to join AI panel at 37th Roth Conference in Dana Point, California on March 16-18, 2025.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR) disclosed that the company's Founder and Executive Chairman, Alex Kong, will be attending the 37th Annual Roth Conference from March 16-18, 2025, at the Laguna Cliffs Marriott in Dana Point, California. CURRENC is a fintech company that provides AI solutions to empower financial institutions globally.

news.headline: Accenture invests in OPAQUE for AI and data solutions, enhancing confidentiality.
news.summary: Last week, there were reports of a significant increase in COVID-19 cases in the country, with a total of 10,000 new cases recorded. This surge has brought the total number of cases to 150,000, causing concern among health officials. In response to this spike, the government has announced new restrictions and guidelines in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, hospitals are experiencing a strain on their resources, with 80% of ICU beds now occupied by COVID-19 patients. The situation remains fluid, with authorities closely monitoring the situation and urging the public to adhere to safety protocols.

news.headline: Trump: US to shortly place 200% tariff on EU wine.
NKGen Biotech to discuss troculeucel for neurodegenerative diseases at Drug Development Summit in Boston on March 18-20, 2025. CEO to present.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, on March 13, 2025, NKGen Biotech, Inc. disclosed that Paul Y. Song, M.D., the Chairman and CEO, will be speaking at the 13th Annual Alzheimer’s & Parkinson’s Drug Development Summit in Boston, MA, from March 18 to 20, 2025. NKGen is known for its work on autologous and allogeneic natural killer (“NK”) cell therapeutics. Dr. Song's presentation will focus on troculeucel, their autologous, non-genetically modified NK cell therapy, as a potential remedy for neurodegenerative diseases. This summit is a significant event for the company and the field, emphasizing the potential of these therapies in addressing neurological disorders.

news.headline: Secured Overnight Financing Rate 4.31% March 12 vs 4.32% March 11.
Trump threatens levies on wines, champagnes out of France.
Trump: If the EU tariff is not removed immediately, the US will retaliate.
BIO-key (BKYI) partners with California Ed Tech JPA to offer identity & access solutions to 195 institutions with 2.6M students.
news.summary: BIO-key, identified as BKYI on the stock market, has recently announced a partnership with a California-based Education Technology Joint Powers Authority (JPA). Through this collaboration, they aim to provide Identity and Access Management solutions to a significant number of institutions, totaling 195 members. This partnership is expected to impact around 2.6 million students who are part of these member institutions.

news.headline: AMSURG in Nashville unveils new company values focused on integrity, collaboration, and excellence.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on March 13, 2025, AMSURG, a prominent national player in ambulatory surgery center (ASC) management and healthcare services, revealed its latest set of company values. These values highlight the company's dedication to integrity, collaboration, and excellence. They signify a renewed commitment to upholding these principles across all operations and interactions moving forward.

news.headline: Gentoo Media Inc. holds Special Meeting with 51.18% shareholders present in Stockholm, Sweden on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: In St. Julians, Malta, on March 13, 2025, a Special Shareholders Meeting took place for Gentoo Media Inc. In Stockholm, Sweden, 51.18% of voting shares were represented by shareholders attending in person or through proxy. The meeting addressed important matters facing the company.

news.headline: Danaos Corp (NYSE: DAC) released 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F, available for review. Large containership owner. Athens, Greece.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on March 13, 2025, Danaos Corporation (NYSE: DAC), a major owner of containerships, revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the period concluding December 31, 2024. As one of the leading independent companies in this sector, Danaos serves a significant role in the global maritime industry. The report provides crucial insights into the company's performance, financial status, and strategic direction for stakeholders and investors. The annual filing offers a comprehensive overview of Danaos Corporation's activities and achievements over the previous year, highlighting key figures and milestones.

news.headline: Cigna Group reshuffles leadership: Brian Evanko COO, Ann Dennison CFO, Nicole Jones to oversee marketing.
news.summary: Brian Evanko has been appointed as the President and Chief Operating Officer of The Cigna Group. Ann Dennison has been named the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of the company. Additionally, Nicole Jones, the current Chief Administrative Officer and General Counsel, will now take on the responsibility of overseeing Enterprise Marketing. This change in leadership comes as part of The Cigna Group's organizational restructuring.

news.headline: Stratus Building Solutions named Fastest Growing Franchise for third year in a row by Entrepreneur, adds 1,152 new locations.
news.summary: An entrepreneur magazine has recognized Stratus Building Solutions as the fastest-growing franchise for the third year in a row. The company, based in Los Angeles, saw a significant increase with the addition of 1,152 new franchises.

news.headline: Mango AI introduces talking photo AI tool to convert images into engaging videos online. Hong Kong, March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Mango AI has recently increased the functionality of its talking photo AI tool, enabling individuals to transform still images into dynamic videos easily. This innovation breathes fresh life into portrait photos, offering users the opportunity to enhance their visual content. The development was announced in Hong Kong on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Virax Biolabs presents data on T-cell dysfunction at 19th meeting. Nasdaq: VRAX. News from London, March 13, 2025.
news.summary: In London on March 13, 2025, Virax Biolabs Group Limited, a biotechnology company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker VRAX, revealed research on immune response detection and viral disease diagnosis. The company shared findings analyzing the impact of...

news.headline: 3rd India Giving Day by IPA urges Indian-Americans to donate $100 to choose charity, with 36 organizations featured.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, the India Philanthropy Alliance (IPA) announced the commencement of their 3rd annual India Giving Day scheduled for March 14, 2025. This event, led by a U.S.-based network of nonprofits and philanthropic organizations dedicated to India, will showcase 36 carefully selected organizations. The initiative aims to raise awareness and funds for various charitable projects in India.

news.headline: Verde Resources reduce carbon emissions by 46% in road construction using TerraZyme® technology - NCAT report.
news.summary: In St. Louis on March 13, 2025, Verde Resources, Inc. made public significant initial results from the National Center for Asphalt Technology (NCAT), showcasing the revolutionary effects of its TerraZyme® technology on road building. The Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) unveiled that...

news.headline: PSP Investments to acquire 7.51% stake in 407 ETR, while CPP & Ferrovial to acquire 6.76% stake from AtkinsRéalis Transactions.
news.summary: Notable Transaction Details: PSP Investments is set to obtain a substantial minority ownership of 7.51% in 407 ETR from CPP Investments. Additionally, CPP Investments and Ferrovial will collectively purchase a 6.76% stake in 407 ETR from AtkinsRéalis Transactions. These agreements will position 407 ETR for upcoming strategic moves.

news.headline: Consultancy firm LEAD3R launched workshop addressing DEIB skills gap; offers Executive Search, Coaching, and HR Services.
news.summary: A consultancy firm named LEAD3R, based in Tustin, California, specializes in assisting clients in creating diverse and robust teams through services like Executive Search, Talent Intelligence, Coaching, Team Effectiveness, and HR Managed Services. Recently, on March 13, 2025, the company unveiled its new initiative...

news.headline: Lucid Diagnostics' EsoGuard® esophageal DNA test receives first commercial insurance coverage, including coverage by Regional Blue Cross Blue Shield plan. (Numbers: March 13, 2025, and Nasdaq: LUCD)
news.summary: A health plan operated by Blue Cross Blue Shield in the region will now provide coverage for non-invasive screening aimed at detecting esophageal precancer and cancer. This initiative was announced in New York on March 13, 2025. Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: LUCD), a company specializing in cancer prevention medical diagnostics, will be involved in this effort. This development represents a significant step towards improving early detection and treatment of esophageal conditions, potentially impacting a large number of individuals covered under the Blue Cross Blue Shield plan.

news.headline: CIFF Guangzhou 2025 to showcase design innovation and industry collab at Canton Fair Complex Mar 18-21 and Mar 28-31.
news.summary: The 55th China International Furniture Fair (Guangzhou) will be held in two phases at the Canton Fair Complex in Guangzhou from March 18-21 and March 28-31, 2025. The upcoming CIFF Guangzhou 2025 is expected to...

news.headline: TransCode Therapeutics approved to open Cohort 4 in Phase I/II trial after positive safety data from previous cohorts. No significant issues reported in Cohorts 1, 2, or 3.
news.summary: Approval has been granted by the Safety Review Committee (SRC) of the clinical trial to proceed with Cohort 4 following the positive safety outcomes observed in the three patients of Cohort 3. No noteworthy safety concerns or dosage-related toxicities have been identified in the participants of Cohorts 1, 2, and 3. The eligibility of patients for Cohort 4 is presently under assessment.

news.headline: Window World partners with Folds of Honor Foundation to honor heroes.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in North Wilkesboro, North Carolina, Window World announced its partnership with the Folds of Honor Foundation. This collaboration aims to support the nation's heroes and their families. Window World, a company committed to honoring veterans, recognizes the importance of acknowledging their sacrifices. Through this partnership, they will contribute to the Foundation's efforts in providing assistance to military families. This initiative exemplifies Window World's dedication to giving back to those who have served the country.

news.headline: German CDU Leader Merz: We propose to meet green demands to expand scope of defence to include civil defence and intelligence funding.
COSCIENS Biopharma Inc. begins Phase 2a trial for avenanthramides as anti-inflammatory product.
news.summary: In Toronto, Ontario, on March 13, 2025, COSCIENS Biopharma Inc. (NASDAQ: CSCI) (TSX: CSCI), a company focused on life science, revealed the commencement of its Phase 2a clinical efficacy trial for its leading avenanthramides product. The product is targeted towards addressing inflammation-related conditions and falls within their range of cosmeceutical, nutraceutical, and pharmaceutical offerings. This development marks a significant step in COSCIENS' research and development efforts.

news.headline: German CDU Leader Merz: We have carried out good talks with greens on financial package.
German CDU Leader Merz: We have changed proposal on infrastructure fund to also include climate protection measures.
Polyrizon begins preclinical trials for intranasal Naloxone to address opioid overdose; focuses on innovative hydrogels.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Raanana, Israel, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ) disclosed the commencement of preclinical trials for their intranasal Naloxone, intended for combating opioid overdose. Polyrizon, a biotech company in development, focuses on pioneering intranasal hydrogels.

news.headline: Omdia forecasts limited supply of display glass in 2025 due to rising energy costs affecting leading glass makers.
news.summary: In London, the market for flat panel display (FPD) glass is projected to experience notable supply challenges in 2025 as per recent analysis from Omdia. Major players such as Corning, AGC, and NEG have traditionally partaken in fierce pricing battles aiming for market dominance. Yet, escalating energy expenses and continual price drops have urged a transition towards enhancing profitability in recent years. This shift has led to a forecasted shortage of FPD glass in the upcoming year, impacting manufacturers and consumers alike.

news.headline: A10 Networks, Inc. priced $200 million convertible senior notes due 2030 in a private offering on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: A10 Networks, Inc. revealed the pricing of its private offering on March 12, 2025, featuring $200,000,000 in aggregate principal amount of 2.75% convertible senior notes due 2030 (the “notes”). The offering is conducted under exemption from the registration requirements of the Securities Act of 1933 to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A. A10 Networks, Inc. is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol ATEN.

news.headline: Investment advice from Hedgeye CEO Keith McCullough is worth considering now.
German Conservatives' Merz: We have to do something to significantly improve our defensive ability, and fast.
Deutsche Bank sees bonuses hit 10-year peak due to strong trading and deal performance.
ZenaTech subsidiary ZenaDrone adds 35 engineers to meet drone production demand in Vancouver, BC.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., based in Vancouver, Canada, disclosed on March 13, 2025, that its subsidiary ZenaDrone is set to enlarge its workforce. The technology firm, known for AI drones and other solutions, aims to boost its team of drone engineers, technicians, and R&D personnel by incorporating 35 new employees. This move is essential to address the production line needs and enhance capabilities for manufacturing drone products. ZenaTech trades on Nasdaq under ZENA, FSE as 49Q, and BMV as ZENA.

news.headline: "Smart Transportation Market report 2025-2030 by ResearchAndMarkets.com: Evaluates market by technology, solutions, transport mode, from 2025 to 2030."
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Smart Transportation Market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report covers the period from 2025 to 2030 and assesses the market based on technology, solution type, transport mode, business model, and vehicle types. It provides insights into global, regional, and country-specific market opportunities in this sector. The report analyzes various aspects of the smart transportation market, with a focus on segmentation by technology and solutions.
